---
title: "tba_extracted"
format: html
---

```{r}

qual_matches <- event_matches("2026week0") |>
    filter(comp_level == "qm") |>
    data_frame()

extract_auto <- function(x) {
  x$autoCount
}

extract_teleop <- function(x) {
  x$teleopCount
}

extract_total <- function(x) {
  x$totalCount
}

auto_count <- sapply(qual_matches[[32]], extract_auto)
teleop_count <- sapply(qual_matches[[32]], extract_teleop)
total_count <- sapply(qual_matches[[32]], extract_total)


extracted_data <- data.frame(Match = qual_matches$match_number, 
                             Auto_Count = auto_count,
                             TeleOp_Count = teleop_count,
                             Total_Count = total_count)

view(extracted_data)

```
